Description


**STEMREGEN® Mobilize** is a proprietary blend of plant extracts and bioactives designed to support the body's innate repair system by supporting stem cell mobilization. It optimizes blood flow, maintains capillary health, and nurtures the endothelial glycocalyx for efficient stem cell delivery to tissues, supporting overall stem cell function in the body.


Featured Review


### Dan M.

Verified Buyer

## This stuff works for us

I am 72 and have had 4 surgeries on a knee. Trying to avoid knee replacement, I have worked out 3 days a week for decades. "Too many birthdays" were catching up with me and I all but resigned myself to the procedure. A friend turned my wife and I on to Stemregen. I figured it was a "Hail Mary" but worth a shot. We have taken it now for 9 months and my knee is no longer sore and stiff even after workouts. Same can be said for the shoulder I injured weightlifting and my wife's IBS hasn't flared in months. This was kind of hard to believe so we decided to give Mobilze a shot. We notice more energy to the point we can tell when we missed a morning of Mobilize. This stuff is spendy but considering the alternative it's a no brainer for us. Only advice I can give is to try it for a MONTH. We are sure glad we did.


Frequently Asked Questions


**Who is STEMREGEN® Mobilize designed for?**

STEMREGEN® Mobilize is for those that want to support their vascular health and microcirculation needed for efficient stem cell delivery, especially athletes.

**How does STEMREGEN® Mobilize support stem cell delivery throughout the body?**

Mobilize promotes blood fluidity, supports capillary strength, enhances nitric oxide production, and maintains glycocalyx integrity through a proprietary blend of plant-based ingredients that create the optimal vascular environment for stem cells to reach every tissue.

**3\. Why is microcirculation important for getting the full benefit of stem cell support?**

Even with more stem cells in circulation, they can only support tissue health if they travel efficiently through blood vessels and into capillaries, which is why Mobilize focuses on optimizing the entire vascular pathway from blood fluidity to glycocalyx health.

**4\. What makes STEMREGEN® Mobilize different from standard circulation supplements?**

Rather than focusing on a single mechanism like nitric oxide, Mobilize supports the full vascular environment (blood fluidity, capillary integrity, glycocalyx health, and nitric oxide) specifically to optimize stem cell delivery as part of the body's innate repair system.


Shipping


We will work quickly to ship your order as soon as possible. Once your order has shipped, you will receive an email with further information. Delivery times vary depending on your location.

![Abstract black and white image with dynamic lines and dots on a dark background](https://www.stemregen.co/cdn/shop/files/mobilize-feature-1.webp?v=1771517764&width=3840)

![Union Icon](https://www.stemregen.co/cdn/shop/files/Union_795c1063-e05c-4b51-811a-92aa3c055527.svg?v=1768944843&width=3840)

## Enhanced Microcirculation

**STEMREGEN® Mobilize** contains fibrinolytic enzymes that reduce blood viscosity by breaking down fibrin.

This supports smoother circulation and promotes more efficient delivery of stem cells throughout the body.

![Close-up of strands on a black background](https://www.stemregen.co/cdn/shop/files/mobilize-feature-2.webp?v=1771517764&width=3840)

![Capillary Integrity Support Icon](https://www.stemregen.co/cdn/shop/files/Capillary-Integrity-Support.svg?v=1768944843&width=3840)

## Capillary Support

**STEMREGEN® Mobilize** supports capillary strength and flexibility through a proprietary blend of natural nitric oxide supporters and bioflavonoids.

These ingredients help promote healthy blood vessel dilation and connective tissue integrity to enhance microcirculation.

![Mobilize Features](https://www.stemregen.co/cdn/shop/files/mobilize-features-3.webp?v=1771517764&width=3840)

![Endothelial Glycocalyx Health Icon](https://www.stemregen.co/cdn/shop/files/Endothelial-Glycocalyx-Health.svg?v=1768944843&width=3840)

## Endothelial Glycocalyx Health

**STEMREGEN® Mobilize** supports the endothelial glycocalyx, a protective layer that helps maintain healthy blood vessel function and smooth cellular flow.

Key ingredients like N-acetyl-glucosamine and fucoidan help reinforce this barrier, supporting optimal circulation.

![Fibrinolytic Enzymes](https://www.stemregen.co/products/mobilize?selling_plan=10676699414)

### Fibrinolytic Enzymes

Supports Blood Fluidity

These enzymes support the body's natural ability to digest fibrin in the blood, promoting healthy blood flow. Traditionally used in various cultures to support cardiovascular health, fibrinolytic enzymes like nattokinase are well-documented for their role in maintaining optimal blood circulation and supporting overall cardiovascular health.

Close

![N-Acetyl-Cysteine (NAC)](https://www.stemregen.co/products/mobilize?selling_plan=10676699414)

### N-Acetyl-Cysteine (NAC)

Enhances Antioxidant Defense

N-Acetyl-Cysteine (NAC) is a precursor to glutathione, supporting the body's natural production of this important antioxidant. Widely used in modern health practices, NAC helps reduce oxidative stress and promote overall cellular health, supporting microcirculation and endothelial function.

Close

![Olive Extract (25% Hydroxytyrosol)](https://www.stemregen.co/products/mobilize?selling_plan=10676699414)

### Olive Extract (25% Hydroxytyrosol)

Supports Vascular Health

Extracted from olives, hydroxytyrosol is a potent antioxidant that supports healthy blood lipids and glycemia. With a rich history in Mediterranean diets and traditional health practices, this compound helps protect blood vessels from oxidative stress, supporting their structural integrity and promoting overall cardiovascular health.

Close

![Rhus coriaria](https://www.stemregen.co/products/mobilize?selling_plan=10676699414)

### Rhus coriaria

Rich in Antioxidants

Rhus coriaria, known for its high ORAC value, is a natural ingredient loaded with antioxidants. Historically used in Middle Eastern and Mediterranean cuisine and medicine, these antioxidants support the body's natural defense mechanisms, promoting overall cellular health and maintaining optimal vascular function.

Close

![Sophora japonica (Rutin, Hesperidin, Quercetin)](https://www.stemregen.co/products/mobilize?selling_plan=10676699414)

### Sophora japonica (Rutin, Hesperidin, Quercetin)

Promotes Capillary Integrity

These bioflavonoids from Sophora japonica support the body's natural collagen formation and capillary integrity. Used in traditional Chinese medicine for their health benefits, rutin, hesperidin, and quercetin help maintain the strength and flexibility of capillaries, supporting healthy microcirculation and vascular health.

Close

![Gotu Kola Extract (90% Triterpenoids)](https://www.stemregen.co/products/mobilize?selling_plan=10676699414)

### Gotu Kola Extract (90% Triterpenoids)

Strengthens Capillaries

Gotu Kola, known as Centella asiatica, has been used in Ayurvedic and traditional Chinese medicine for centuries to support the natural strength and elasticity of capillaries. The triterpenoids in Gotu Kola promote vascular health by supporting the structural integrity and flexibility of capillaries, enhancing overall microcirculation.

Close

![Pomegranate Extract (40% Ellagic Acid)](https://www.stemregen.co/products/mobilize?selling_plan=10676699414)

### Pomegranate Extract (40% Ellagic Acid)

Supports Vascular Health

Pomegranate extract, rich in ellagic acid, supports capillary integrity and vascular health. Revered in ancient cultures for its numerous health benefits, pomegranate promotes the health of the endothelial glycocalyx, supporting the structural integrity of blood vessels and promoting efficient microcirculation.

Close

![Ginkgo Biloba Extract](https://www.stemregen.co/products/mobilize?selling_plan=10676699414)

### Ginkgo Biloba Extract

Enhances Blood Circulation

Ginkgo biloba has been used for thousands of years in traditional Chinese medicine to support healthy blood circulation. It promotes the dilation of blood vessels and aids in blood fluidity, helping to maintain efficient microcirculation, particularly in the brain and extremities, and supporting overall vascular health.

Close

![Ascophyllum Nodosum (70% Fucoidan)](https://www.stemregen.co/products/mobilize?selling_plan=10676699414)

### Ascophyllum Nodosum (70% Fucoidan)

Supports Glycocalyx Health

Fucoidan, extracted from the brown seaweed Ascophyllum nodosum, has been traditionally used in Asian cultures for its health benefits. It supports the maintenance of a healthy endothelial glycocalyx, which plays a crucial role in protecting capillaries and facilitating cell migration, promoting optimal blood flow and vascular health.

Close

![StemAFA™](https://www.stemregen.co/products/mobilize?selling_plan=10676699414)

### StemAFA™

Increases the number of circulating stem cells by 25%

AFA is a blue-green algae growing naturally in Klamath Lake, Southern Oregon.  AFA extract has been documented to increase the number of circulating stem cells by 25%.  AFA is also been known for its effect on the immune system and for supporting mental energy and clarity.

Close

![Glucosamine Sulfate](https://www.stemregen.co/products/mobilize?selling_plan=10676699414)

### Glucosamine Sulfate

Promotes Glycocalyx Health

Glucosamine sulfate supports the health of the endothelial glycocalyx, which is essential for capillary integrity. Widely used in modern supplements for joint health, glucosamine sulfate helps maintain the structural integrity and function of capillaries, supporting healthy blood flow.

Close

![N-Acetyl-D-Glucosamine](https://www.stemregen.co/products/mobilize?selling_plan=10676699414)

### N-Acetyl-D-Glucosamine

Supports Capillary Health

N-Acetyl-D-Glucosamine supports the health of the endothelial glycocalyx, aiding in capillary integrity. Known for its role in joint health, this compound helps maintain the structural integrity of blood vessels, facilitating optimal microcirculation and overall vascular health.

Close

![Beetroot Extract (10% Nitrate)](https://www.stemregen.co/products/mobilize?selling_plan=10676699414)

### Beetroot Extract (10% Nitrate)

Boosts Nitric Oxide Production

Beetroot extract is a natural source of nitrates, supporting the body's natural production of nitric oxide. Historically used for its health benefits, beetroot promotes the dilation of blood vessels, enhancing microcirculation and supporting overall cardiovascular health.

Close

![L-Citrulline](https://www.stemregen.co/products/mobilize?selling_plan=10676699414)

### L-Citrulline

Enhances Nitric Oxide Production

L-Citrulline is an amino acid that supports the body's natural production of nitric oxide. Traditionally found in watermelons, L-Citrulline promotes vasodilation, supporting optimal blood flow and enhancing microcirculation, benefiting cardiovascular health and physical endurance.

Close

THE PROTOCOL

As Part of “The STEMREGEN® Protocol”

**STEMREGEN® Mobilize**, in combination with STEMREGEN® Release and SIGNAL, form a comprehensive approach to tapping into the potential of stem cells.

While SIGNAL fine-tunes the body’s cellular communication, ensuring stem cells circulate throughout the body, and RELEASE supports stem cell release and migration, MOBILIZE helps stem cells to seamlessly travel through blood vessels, resulting in efficient stem cell delivery. Each component of the system plays a distinct role, yet together this triad supports the body’s innate repair system, paving the way for healthy aging with optimal health and longevity.

[Learn More](https://www.stemregen.co/pages/protocols)

[![STEMREGEN Mobilize](https://www.stemregen.co/cdn/shop/articles/014_-_STEMREGEN_Mobilize.png?crop=center&height=900&v=1731523437&width=1600)\\
\\
Product VideoSTEMREGEN Mobilize\\

**DISCLAIMER:** At STEMREGEN®, our mission is to educate on the potential of stem cells and their role as the body’s innate repair system. The information provided on this website—including articles, educational content, copy, video testimonials, and other materials—is intended solely for informational and educational purposes. Our claim is simple: STEMREGEN® supports the body’s natural repair system by increasing the number of circulating stem cells. We invite you to consider, “If you have more stem cells in circulation, what could happen?”

Our products are backed by scientific research, and we substantiate the increase in circulating stem cells through documented clinical trials and ongoing studies. We reference peer-reviewed articles and research to demonstrate the broader effects of stem cells in the body, highlighting outcomes that are grounded in science. Any research we present is based on clinical trials conducted by our company and/or independent laboratories, ensuring the credibility and validity of the results.

Please note that none of the content shared here is intended to make medical claims, diagnose, treat, or provide medical advice for any conditions. The personal stories and experiences shared are unique to the individuals and should not be interpreted as guarantees of specific outcomes. Always consult with a healthcare professional before beginning any new supplement or treatment. The statements on this site have not been evaluated by the FDA, and our products are not intended to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease.

metadata.ogTitle: STEMREGEN® Stem Cell Supplement - Mobilize – Stemregen
metadata.title: STEMREGEN® Stem Cell Supplement - Mobilize – Stemregen
metadata.twitter:title: STEMREGEN® Stem Cell Supplement - Mobilize – Stemregen
metadata.twitter:description: STEMREGEN® Mobilize enhances microcirculation, ensuring that stem cells and other essential nutrients can travel smoothly through the bloodstream. It contains fibrinolytic enzymes to reduce blood viscosity, natural nitric oxide producers to dilate blood vessels, polysaccharides to support healthy glycocalyx, and bioflavonoids to support capillary health. This comprehensive support for microcirculation is vital for efficient stem cell delivery and optimal tissue repair.
